si.t: Frequently used/Derived variables (Admissions) - Selectivity and admissions yield, Fall 2023

This table contains derived variables using the applications and admissions data. Included are the percent of applicants that are admitted (selectivity) and the percent of admitted students that enrolled (admissions yield).

IPEDS data, including provisional release data and final release data, adhere to rigorous quality control procedures established by NCES. Data are imputed for nonresponding institutions. Provisional release data are used for First Look web tables. Final release data include revisions to the provisional release data that have been made by institutions during the subsequent data collection year. While the final release data offer the most up to date data, these data may not match tables from the First Look web tables based on provisional release data.

Variable list: Lists all variables in the table. Includes the variable name, variable label and the Data type, format and maximum field width of each variable. The data type describes a variable as either a numeric (N) or Alphanumeric (A) and the format of a variable defines a variable as either continuous (Cont) or categorical (Disc). It all also lists the variable name of all imputation flag variables for each continuous variable. Imputation flag variable describes whether a value for the corresponding variable was reported, imputed or not applicable.
Long description or glossary definition of a variable.
This worksheet lists the sum, mean, minimum and maximum values of all continuous variables in the data file. (Provisional release)
This worksheet lists the sum, mean, minimum and maximum values of all continuous variables in the data file. (Final/revised release)
Unique identification number of the institution

Percent admitted - total_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of total applicants (APPLCN) > 0 _x000D_ then Percent admitted total (DVADM01) = number of admissions-total(ADMSSN) divided by the total applicants(APPCLN)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Percent admitted - men_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of applicants-men (APPLCNM) > 0 _x000D_ then Percent admitted-men (DVADM02) = number of admissions-Men(ADMSSNM) divided by the applicants-men(APPCLNM)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Percent admitted - women_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of applicants-women (APPLCNW) > 0 _x000D_ then Percent admitted-women (DVADM03) = number of admissions-women(ADMSSNW) divided by the applicants-women(APPCLNW)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - total_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of total admitted (ADMSSN) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield (DVADM04) = number enrolled (ENRLT) divided by the number admitted (ADMSSN)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - men_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-men (ADMSSNM) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-men (DVADM05) = number enrolled-men (ENRLM) divided by the number admitted-men (ADMSSNM)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - women_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-women (ADMSSNW) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-women (DVADM06) = number enrolled-women (ENRLW) divided by the number admitted-women (ADMSSNW)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - full time_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of total admitted (ADMSSN) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield - full time(DVADM07) = number enrolled (ENRLFT) divided by the number admitted (ADMSSN)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - full-time men_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-men (ADMSSNM) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-full-time men(DVADM08) = number enrolled-full-time men (ENRLFTM) divided by the number admitted-men (ADMSSNM)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - full-time women_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-women (ADMSSNW) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-full-time women (DVADM09) = number enrolled-full-time women (ENRLFTW) divided by the number admitted-women (ADMSSNW)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - part time_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of total admitted (ADMSSN) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield - part time(DVADM10) = number enrolled (ENRLPT) divided by the number admitted (ADMSSN)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - part-time men_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-men (ADMSSNM) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-part-time men(DVADM11) = number enrolled-part-time men (ENRLPTM) divided by the number admitted-men (ADMSSNM)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.

Admissions yield - part-time women_x000D_ _x000D_ If number of admitted-women (ADMSSNW) > 0 _x000D_ then Admissions yield-part-time women (DVADM12) = number enrolled-part-time women (ENRLPTW) divided by the number admitted-women (ADMSSNW)_x000D_ Ratios are converted to percentages and rounded to the nearest whole number.
